case_title: SE HO LEE VS. DILIP KARKI ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-09-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, SE HO AS TO DEFENDANT KARKI, DILIP DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-05-2018
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100062524)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-26-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
